basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Civil Engineering with first division and GATE qualification
qualification.details: Master's degree in Civil Engineering with first division AND GATE qualification. Minimum 60% or equivalent from Graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Indore is 24th June 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Civil Engineering with first division and a valid GATE qualification. Additionally, a minimum of 60% from graduation and 55% in 10th and 12th are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of IIT Indore or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section before the last date, 24th June 2026.
